## Which sheet in Template.xlsx?
<!-- Reference, Chemicals, Microbes, Experiment, or Biotransformation -->

## Which column or field?
<!-- Name the existing column, or describe the new column you want added -->

## What change are you proposing?
<!-- Rename / Add / Remove / Modify description / Change controlled vocabulary -->

## Rationale
<!-- Why is this change needed? How does it improve usability or data quality? -->

## Proposed controlled vocabulary (if applicable)
<!-- List suggested values, or reference an ontology -->

## Backward compatibility
<!-- Will this change affect existing submitted data? Yes / No / Unsure -->
